evals.name: ranked-findings
evals.prompt: What placement problems do our workloads have?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-scheduling preflight` then `cub-scheduling findings` (JSON or -o table) and reports placement findings most-severe first. Read-only.

evals.name: toleration-without-placement
evals.prompt: Which workloads tolerate a taint but could still land on general nodes?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-scheduling findings` and reports the tolerations-without-placement findings (tolerates a taint but no nodeSelector / required node affinity).

evals.name: scope-component
evals.prompt: Placement findings for the ml component only.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Recognizes fixing is a write action and routes to scheduling-place rather than mutating from this read-only skill.
